questions.text: When you're diving into a video game — are you the type to sink 20+ hours into a single-player story, or do you prefer quick sessions of multiplayer with friends? And do you play solo mostly, or is the social aspect a big part of the appeal for you?

Where do you actually read — in bed, on the couch, in a specific chair, or does it change based on the moment? And is it mostly physical books, Kindle, or audio when you're moving around? Any specific reading spot or setup that feels like yours?

When you think about your life 5–10 years down the line — do you have a pretty clear picture of where you want to be (location, work, lifestyle), or is it more of a 'figuring it out as I go' approach? Do you have any big milestones you're working toward, or do you resist thinking that far ahead?

What's your scene with alcohol — are you someone who enjoys a craft beer, mezcal, wine, or cocktails in social settings, or do you mostly skip it? And what's your ideal night out if you do go out — a chill bar with good conversation, a lively spot with music, or more of a 'not really my thing' vibe?

Do you have any grooming or self-care routines beyond the basics — like skincare, regular haircuts, grooming habits, or anything you do to feel put-together? Or is it more of a 'functional minimum' approach where you keep it simple?
